'''ngagowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osbipy|osbipy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osbipy|osbipy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngagowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngægeweth|ngægeweth]] || [[word:ngægewej|ngægewej]] || [[word:ngægewesh|ngægewesh]] || [[word:ngægewe|ngægewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngagogowoth|ngagogowoth]] || [[word:ngagogowoj|ngagogowoj]] || [[word:ngagogowosh|ngagogowosh]] || [[word:ngagogowo|ngagogowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngagowoth|ngagowoth]] || [[word:ngagowoj|ngagowoj]] || [[word:ngagowosh|ngagowosh]] || [[word:ngagowo|ngagowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngagofwoth|ngagofwoth]] || [[word:ngagofwoj|ngagofwoj]] || [[word:ngagofwosh|ngagofwosh]] || [[word:ngagofwof|ngagofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngagowotho|ngagowotho]] || [[word:ngagowojo|ngagowojo]] || [[word:ngagowosho|ngagowosho]] || [[word:ngagowoko|ngagowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngagowoth|ngagowoth]] || [[word:ngagowoj|ngagowoj]] || [[word:ngagowosh|ngagowosh]] || [[word:ngagowo|ngagowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngagowothol|ngagowothol]] || [[word:ngagowojol|ngagowojol]] || [[word:ngagowoshol|ngagowoshol]] || [[word:ngagowokol|ngagowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngagowothotho|ngagowothotho]] || [[word:ngagowojojo|ngagowojojo]] || [[word:ngagowoshosho|ngagowoshosho]] || [[word:ngagowoko|ngagowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngagowothon|ngagowothon]] || [[word:ngagowojon|ngagowojon]] || [[word:ngagowoshon|ngagowoshon]] || [[word:ngagowokon|ngagowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngagowothoro|ngagowothoro]] || [[word:ngagowojoro|ngagowojoro]] || [[word:ngagowoshoro|ngagowoshoro]] || [[word:ngagowokoro|ngagowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
